requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Safety Requirements — Secondary Lithium/Na-ion Cells and Batteries (Industrial Applications)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池安全要求——工业用二次锂/钠离子电芯及电池
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池安全要求——工業用二次鋰/鈉離子電芯及電池

summary.en: EN IEC 62619:2022 specifies safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, covering electrical, mechanical, environmental and safety abuse tests. Its scope references 'lithium' technology but the standard is largely test-method based; applicability to Na-ion cells is [UNVERIFIED] — confirmation from CENELEC or the notified body is required before relying on this standard for Na-ion CE marking. LVD 2014/35/EU requires battery systems placed on the EU market to meet applicable harmonised standards; EN IEC 62619 is listed as a supporting harmonised standard under LVD.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62619:2022规定了工业用二次锂电芯及电池的安全要求，涵盖电气、机械、环境及滥用测试。其范围明确提及「锂」技术，但标准本质上基于测试方法；其对钠离子电芯的适用性[未经核实]——在依据本标准申请钠离子电池CE认证前，需向CENELEC或公告机构确认。LVD 2014/35/EU要求进入欧盟市场的电池系统符合相关协调标准，EN IEC 62619已列为LVD下的支持性协调标准。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62619:2022規定了工業用二次鋰電芯及電池的安全要求，涵蓋電氣、機械、環境及濫用測試。其範圍明確提及「鋰」技術，但標準本質上基於測試方法；其對鈉離子電芯的適用性[未經核實]——在依據本標準申請鈉離子電池CE認證前，需向CENELEC或公告機構確認。LVD 2014/35/EU要求進入歐盟市場的電池系統符合相關協調標準，EN IEC 62619已列為LVD下的支持性協調標準。

standards_or_laws.title: EN IEC 62619:2022 — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications
standards_or_laws.note: [UNVERIFIED] — scope says 'lithium'; Na-ion applicability requires notified-body confirmation. URL updated 2026-06-12: old webstore.nsf path returns 403, replaced with confirmed IEC webstore canonical URL.

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 covers safety requirements for lithium-ion battery energy storage systems for power generation side and grid side; it is the closest CN equivalent for cell/system safety but is scoped to Li-ion. Na-ion-specific national standards are still emerging in China as of 2026; GB/T 42288-2022 addresses electrochemical energy storage station safety but also centres on Li-ion chemistry. Exporters should monitor SAMR/SAC drafts for Na-ion-specific standards (no finalized GB/T Na-ion safety standard confirmed as of the access date).
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023涵盖电源侧及电网侧锂离子电池储能系统的安全要求，是电芯/系统安全方面最接近的国内等效标准，但其范围限于锂离子。截至2026年，中国钠离子专用国家标准仍在制定中；GB/T 42288-2022涉及电化学储能站安全，但同样以锂离子化学体系为中心。出口商应持续关注市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会发布的钠离子专项标准草案（截至查阅日期，尚无已发布的钠离子安全GB/T标准获确认）。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023涵蓋電源側及電網側鋰離子電池儲能系統的安全要求，是電芯/系統安全方面最接近的國內等效標準，但其範圍限於鋰離子。截至2026年，中國鈉離子專用國家標準仍在制定中；GB/T 42288-2022涉及電化學儲能站安全，但同樣以鋰離子化學體系為中心。出口商應持續關注市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會發布的鈉離子專項標準草案（截至查閱日期，尚無已發布的鈉離子安全GB/T標準獲確認）。

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage
standards_or_laws.note: [UNVERIFIED] — URL is illustrative; verify exact record on openstd.samr.gov.cn

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 42288-2022 — Safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage station
standards_or_laws.note: [UNVERIFIED] — URL is illustrative; verify exact record on openstd.samr.gov.cn

gap.en: EN IEC 62619 was developed for lithium-cell chemistry; its explicit applicability to Na-ion cells has not been confirmed by CENELEC or the IEC TC21 committee as of the access date [UNVERIFIED]. Exporters must obtain a written ruling from their chosen EU notified body on whether Na-ion cells fall within EN IEC 62619 scope, or whether a deviation/supplementary test protocol is required. No harmonised EU standard specifically named for Na-ion exists yet. On the CN side, no finalised GB/T Na-ion safety standard has been published, creating a standards vacuum that makes equivalence mapping difficult.
gap.zh: EN IEC 62619是针对锂电池化学体系开发的；截至查阅日期，CENELEC或IEC TC21委员会尚未确认其对钠离子电芯的明确适用性[未经核实]。出口商须向其选定的欧盟公告机构获取书面裁定，确认钠离子电芯是否在EN IEC 62619范围内，或是否需要偏差/补充测试规程。目前尚无专门针对钠离子的欧盟协调标准。在国内方面，亦无已发布的钠离子安全GB/T标准，导致等效对应工作存在标准空白。
gap.zht: EN IEC 62619是針對鋰電池化學體系開發的；截至查閱日期，CENELEC或IEC TC21委員會尚未確認其對鈉離子電芯的明確適用性[未經核實]。出口商須向其選定的歐盟公告機構獲取書面裁定，確認鈉離子電芯是否在EN IEC 62619範圍內，或是否需要偏差/補充測試規程。目前尚無專門針對鈉離子的歐盟協調標準。在國內方面，亦無已發布的鈉離子安全GB/T標準，導致等效對應工作存在標準空白。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (CE marking required under LVD 2014/35/EU for covered voltage ranges; EN IEC 62619 is a harmonised supporting standard)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 36276 is voluntary; mandatory safety requirements may apply via GB mandatory sections or project-specific procurement specs)

compliance_verdict.en: For informational purposes only. Na-ion cells exported from China to the EU as part of industrial ESS will likely need to demonstrate conformity with EN IEC 62619 (or a recognised equivalent/deviation) under LVD 2014/35/EU. However, the explicit scope of EN IEC 62619 for Na-ion chemistry is [UNVERIFIED] and must be confirmed with a CENELEC-accredited notified body before commencing CE marking. No harmonised EU standard specifically covering Na-ion safety has been identified. Engage a notified body early.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。从中国出口至欧盟的工业储能系统中的钠离子电池，可能需在LVD 2014/35/EU框架下证明符合EN IEC 62619（或获认可的等效/偏差标准）。然而，EN IEC 62619对钠离子化学体系的明确适用范围[未经核实]，在启动CE认证前须向CENELEC认可的公告机构确认。目前未发现专门涵盖钠离子安全的欧盟协调标准。建议尽早联系公告机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。從中國出口至歐盟的工業儲能系統中的鈉離子電池，可能需在LVD 2014/35/EU框架下證明符合EN IEC 62619（或獲認可的等效/偏差標準）。然而，EN IEC 62619對鈉離子化學體系的明確適用範圍[未經核實]，在啟動CE認證前須向CENELEC認可的公告機構確認。目前未發現專門涵蓋鈉離子安全的歐盟協調標準。建議盡早聯繫公告機構。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Storage System Safety — Electrochemical ESS Safety Requirements (Chemistry-Agnostic)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统安全——电化学储能系统安全要求（化学体系中性）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統安全——電化學儲能系統安全要求（化學體系中性）

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2025 (Ed. 2.0, Dec 2025) (Electrical Energy Storage — Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated electrochemical-based energy storage systems) supersedes the 2020 edition (Ed. 1.0) and is designed to be chemistry-agnostic, explicitly covering electrochemical ESS regardless of cell chemistry, making it directly applicable to Na-ion-based systems [applicability to Na-ion is more straightforward than EN IEC 62619, but [UNVERIFIED] in practice — confirm with notified body; Ed. 2.0 scope lists Li-ion, lead-acid, Ni, flow batteries, Li metal solid-state, and 'other technologies' — Na-ion falls under 'other technologies' but this is not explicitly confirmed]. The standard addresses system-level safety including thermal runaway, BMS requirements, fire protection, installation and O&M. In the EU, conformity may be demonstrated under LVD 2014/35/EU and the Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 for stationary storage applications.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2025（Ed. 2.0，2025年12月）（电力储能——第5-2部分：并网电化学储能系统安全要求）取代2020版（Ed. 1.0），被设计为化学体系中性，明确覆盖各类电芯化学体系的电化学储能系统，因此直接适用于钠离子体系[对钠离子的适用性比EN IEC 62619更为直接，但实践中[未经核实]——请向公告机构确认；Ed. 2.0范围列明锂离子、铅酸、镍基、液流电池、金属锂固态电池及「其他技术」——钠离子可能归属「其他技术」条款，但尚未明确确认]。该标准涵盖系统级安全要求，包括热失控、电池管理系统要求、消防保护、安装及运维。在欧盟，可通过LVD 2014/35/EU及适用于固定储能的《电池法规》(EU) 2023/1542证明符合性。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2025（Ed. 2.0，2025年12月）（電力儲能——第5-2部分：並網電化學儲能系統安全要求）取代2020版（Ed. 1.0），被設計為化學體系中性，明確覆蓋各類電芯化學體系的電化學儲能系統，因此直接適用於鈉離子體系[對鈉離子的適用性比EN IEC 62619更為直接，但實踐中[未經核實]——請向公告機構確認；Ed. 2.0範圍列明鋰離子、鉛酸、鎳基、液流電池、金屬鋰固態電池及「其他技術」——鈉離子可能歸屬「其他技術」條款，但尚未明確確認]。該標準涵蓋系統級安全要求，包括熱失控、電池管理系統要求、消防保護、安裝及運維。在歐盟，可透過LVD 2014/35/EU及適用於固定儲能的《電池法規》(EU) 2023/1542證明符合性。

standards_or_laws.title: IEC 62933-5-2:2025 (Ed. 2.0) — Electrical energy storage (EES) systems — Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems — Electrochemical-based systems
standards_or_laws.note: [UNVERIFIED for Na-ion explicit scope] — Edition updated to 2.0 (Dec 2025) — old :2020 ed. 1.0 superseded. URL updated 2026-06-12: old webstore.nsf path returns 403, replaced with confirmed IEC webstore canonical URL. Standard lists Li-ion, lead-acid, Ni, flow batteries, Li metal solid-state, and 'other technologies' — Na-ion not explicitly named but 'other technologies' clause may cover it; confirm with EU notified body.

standards_or_laws.title: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 — Batteries and waste batteries (EU Battery Regulation)

summary.en: GB/T 34120-2017 covers general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems and is chemistry-agnostic at the system level. GB/T 42288-2022 addresses safety requirements specifically for electrochemical energy storage stations, also applicable across chemistries. These are the closest CN system-level equivalents to IEC 62933-5-2. Na-ion-specific system-level safety standards under the GB/T framework had not been finalised as of the access date; the China Na-ion industry consortium (CIAPS) and SAC/TC114 were reported to be drafting Na-ion standards but no GB/T specifically for Na-ion ESS safety was confirmed published.
summary.zh: GB/T 34120-2017涵盖电化学储能系统的通用技术要求，在系统层面具有化学体系中性特征。GB/T 42288-2022专门针对电化学储能站的安全要求，同样适用于各类化学体系。这两项标准是IEC 62933-5-2在国内系统层面最接近的等效标准。截至查阅日期，GB/T框架下针对钠离子的专项系统级安全标准尚未发布；据悉中国化学与物理电源行业协会（CIAPS）及SAC/TC114正在起草钠离子标准，但尚无专门针对钠离子储能系统安全的GB/T标准获确认发布。
summary.zht: GB/T 34120-2017涵蓋電化學儲能系統的通用技術要求，在系統層面具有化學體系中性特徵。GB/T 42288-2022專門針對電化學儲能站的安全要求，同樣適用於各類化學體系。這兩項標準是IEC 62933-5-2在國內系統層面最接近的等效標準。截至查閱日期，GB/T框架下針對鈉離子的專項系統級安全標準尚未發布；據悉中國化學與物理電源行業協會（CIAPS）及SAC/TC114正在起草鈉離子標準，但尚無專門針對鈉離子儲能系統安全的GB/T標準獲確認發布。

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 34120-2017 — General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage system
standards_or_laws.note: [UNVERIFIED] — URL is illustrative; verify exact record on openstd.samr.gov.cn

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 42288-2022 — Safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage station
standards_or_laws.note: [UNVERIFIED] — URL is illustrative; verify exact record on openstd.samr.gov.cn

gap.en: IEC 62933-5-2 is chemistry-agnostic in scope, making it more directly applicable to Na-ion ESS than EN IEC 62619. However, Na-ion-specific test data (e.g., thermal runaway propagation characteristics, electrolyte composition hazards) may differ from Li-ion; the standard's test protocols may need supplementary validation for Na-ion systems. On the CN side, no dedicated GB/T Na-ion ESS safety standard exists, meaning CN exporters cannot point to a directly equivalent domestic standard when mapping to IEC 62933-5-2. The EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) introduces additional due-diligence and documentation requirements (carbon footprint, supply chain) that apply to Na-ion batteries for stationary storage and are not mirrored in current CN standards.
gap.zh: IEC 62933-5-2在范围上具有化学体系中性，相较EN IEC 62619更直接适用于钠离子储能系统。然而，钠离子专项测试数据（如热失控蔓延特性、电解质成分危害）可能与锂离子存在差异；该标准的测试规程可能需要针对钠离子系统进行补充验证。在国内方面，目前没有专门的GB/T钠离子储能系统安全标准，意味着国内出口商在映射至IEC 62933-5-2时无法援引直接等效的国内标准。欧盟《电池法规》(2023/1542)还对固定储能用钠离子电池引入了额外的尽职调查及文件要求（碳足迹、供应链），这些要求在现行国内标准中尚无对应体现。
gap.zht: IEC 62933-5-2在範圍上具有化學體系中性，相較EN IEC 62619更直接適用於鈉離子儲能系統。然而，鈉離子專項測試數據（如熱失控蔓延特性、電解質成分危害）可能與鋰離子存在差異；該標準的測試規程可能需要針對鈉離子系統進行補充驗證。在國內方面，目前沒有專門的GB/T鈉離子儲能系統安全標準，意味著國內出口商在映射至IEC 62933-5-2時無法援引直接等效的國內標準。歐盟《電池法規》(2023/1542)還對固定儲能用鈉離子電池引入了額外的盡職調查及文件要求（碳足跡、供應鏈），這些要求在現行國內標準中尚無對應體現。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory framework (LVD 2014/35/EU and EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 apply; IEC 62933-5-2 is a supporting technical standard — harmonised status under EU Battery Regulation to be confirmed)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 34120 and GB/T 42288 are voluntary national standards; mandatory requirements may apply via project-specific grid-connection or safety-review specs)

compliance_verdict.en: For informational purposes only. IEC 62933-5-2 is likely the most relevant system-level safety standard for Na-ion ESS exported to the EU due to its chemistry-agnostic scope, but its harmonised status under EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 and LVD 2014/35/EU should be verified with a notified body. Na-ion-specific test data requirements may necessitate supplementary testing beyond standard Li-ion protocols. The EU Battery Regulation introduces additional obligations (carbon footprint declaration, supply-chain due diligence) not covered by IEC 62933-5-2 alone. Legal and regulatory advice should be obtained before placing Na-ion ESS on the EU market.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。由于化学体系中性的范围，IEC 62933-5-2可能是出口至欧盟的钠离子储能系统在系统层面最相关的安全标准，但其在《欧盟电池法规》2023/1542及LVD 2014/35/EU下的协调标准地位应向公告机构确认。钠离子专项测试数据要求可能需要超越标准锂离子规程的补充测试。欧盟《电池法规》还引入了IEC 62933-5-2本身未覆盖的额外义务（碳足迹申报、供应链尽职调查）。在将钠离子储能系统投放欧盟市场前，应获取法律及监管专业意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。由於化學體系中性的範圍，IEC 62933-5-2可能是出口至歐盟的鈉離子儲能系統在系統層面最相關的安全標準，但其在《歐盟電池法規》2023/1542及LVD 2014/35/EU下的協調標準地位應向公告機構確認。鈉離子專項測試數據要求可能需要超越標準鋰離子規程的補充測試。歐盟《電池法規》還引入了IEC 62933-5-2本身未覆蓋的額外義務（碳足跡申報、供應鏈盡職調查）。在將鈉離子儲能系統投放歐盟市場前，應獲取法律及監管專業意見。
